title: Confiture
description:
A super-tiny mod to prevent the spawn of all vanilla minecraft mobs except villagers. Entities like armorstand remain unchanged. 
Some mob sounds may be heard when they try to spawn and get denied. Unfortunately I can't fix for this.
body:
Hello there, 

If you landed on this page, you're probably playing Cobblemon. If so, you probably don't want to see these ugly creatures from vanilla minecraft in your game. 
Confiture can help you in this, install it on your server if multiplayer to prevent the spawn of any vanilla minecraft mob except villagers. Any other entities that are not tagged as minecraft mobs remain unchanged.

The latest versions support both client and server sides, if you play solo or online.

/!\ I have received one report signaling issues with memory and cpu usage in some server conditions, Confiture may be responsible for crashes or slowed servers.
Beware and watch out for any unwanted mod behaviour.
THESE ISSUES SHOULD BE FIXED ON CONFITURE 1.4

Also please let me know if you have experienced similar issues !

CarbOn
